message:
feat(math): add nexttoward/nexttowardf and expand support matrix coverage [bd-2vv.4]

Implement C99 nexttoward/nexttowardf across all three layers (core, ABI,
version script) and add 26 previously missing math symbols to the support
matrix, closing the drift between ABI exports and matrix tracking.

Core implementations:
- nexttoward(f64, f64) → f64 via libm::nextafter
- nexttowardf(f32, f64) → f32 with f64-precision direction comparison

Support matrix additions (24 pre-existing + 2 new):
- Bessel family: j0, j1, jn, y0, y1, yn + f32 variants
- remquo/remquof, nan/nanf, sincos/sincosf
- Compat aliases: drem, gamma, finite, significand, exp10/exp10f
- New: nexttoward, nexttowardf

Also fixes clippy excessive_precision in float32 Bessel test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
